patch.value: Semantic index not auto-refreshed on mutation: create then pm search --semantic misses the new item (stale index)

After pm create, an immediate pm search --semantic searches the stale vector index and warns vector_index_stale:1; the new item is absent until pm reindex runs, despite mutation_refresh_policy=semantic_configured. Agents expecting fresh semantic results right after a write silently miss new items. Consider cheap on-mutation incremental embed (~150ms/item) or make the reindex-after-write contract explicit in health/docs. Lower priority than the all-or-nothing defaults bug.

Made the refresh-after-write contract explicit (the item's stated alternative resolution): the vector_index_stale warning now states new/modified items are excluded from semantic/hybrid results until pm reindex, and CONFIGURATION.md documents search.mutation_refresh_policy + that keyword mode always reflects writes. Cheap incremental on-mutation embed deferred as a future optimization.
